review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a key component of maintaining security and privacy attributes. The naming conventions are mostly followed, but minor improvements can be made for clarity. The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities.
title: Security And Privacy Attributes - Ensure that the attribute associations...
step1_reasoning: The control AC-16-b focuses on ensuring that security and privacy attributes are properly associated and retained, which aligns with audit and logging practices in Kubernetes. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to retain logs for a specific period, similar to cloud log retention policies. Ensuring audit logging is enabled and that the audit policy captures necessary metadata helps maintain security and privacy attributes.
